description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a contoured double-cutaway body finished in black, featuring a white pickguard that covers much of the front surface. The neck is made of a lighter wood, likely maple, and is bolted onto the body, extending to a headstock with six inline tuning pegs. The front face displays three single-coil pickups, a five-way selector switch, and three control knobs, typical of a Stratocaster-style design. The back of the guitar is plain black with no visible electronics or cavity covers, and the sides reveal the instrument's slim profile. The strings run from the bridge on the body up to the headstock, passing over a white nut. This guitar is designed for use in musical performances and is commonly seen in urban environments such as street performances, music venues, and studios.
description: A black, double-cutaway electric guitar with a white pickguard, maple neck, and six inline tuning pegs, featuring three single-coil pickups and classic Stratocaster styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black body, white pickguard, three single-coil pickups, control knobs, and maple neck with headstock.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the guitar's slim, contoured body and the thickness of the neck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain black back of the body and the back of the maple neck and headstock.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the thinness of the body and neck.
attribute_headstock_design: Six inline tuning pegs, elongated headstock, no visible logo
